captions.reasoning: The image shows a close-up, cartoon-style scene: a hyena faces a black bird (looks like a crow) against a blue sky with a few white clouds. The hyena’s paw is extended toward the bird as if talking or making a request, matching the story text about wanting to fly.
captions.caption: A hyena leans toward a black bird and reaches out a paw as they face each other under white clouds in a blue sky.
